headline: EQR's Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Coastal Demand Strength
summary: EQR beats Q1 normalized FFO estimates as demand strengthens, occupancy stays at 96.5%, and returns rise via buybacks and a dividend hike.

raw.headline: EQR's Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Coastal Demand Strength

headline: ESS Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Strong Same-Property NOI
summary: ESS tops Q1 core FFO estimates on 4.1% same-property NOI growth. Revenues rise to $484.8M, with guidance reaffirmed after NOI-driven upside.

raw.headline: ESS Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Strong Same-Property NOI
